title: critoniella lebrijensis
intro: Critoniella lebrijensis, also known as Spanish critoniella, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a perennial herb native to the Iberian Peninsula, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. Critoniella lebrijensis is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive well-being. The plant's leaves and flowers can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat colds, fever, and respiratory issues.
